title: Fable Animal Brand Mark Logo AI
sourceTitle: Fable Animal Brand Mark Logo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Original fable-like animal brand mark for VELORA, built around a moonlit heron with flowing ribbon-like body lines and quiet grace, mystery, and renewal. Subject: a moonlit heron with flowing ribbon-like body lines appears as an elegant symbolic silhouette for VELORA, refined and poetic rather than mascot-like. Scene: Clean white or ivory brand presentation surface with large negative space, tiny symbolic details, and a calm premium identity mood. Composition: Fixed centered logo composition with flowing silhouette lines, balanced wordmark area, subtitle placement, editorial spacing, and generous empty space. Style: Premium poetic logo design with surreal refined posture, elegant animal silhouette, clean vector-like edges, editorial typography, and mysterious boutique-brand polish. Color Palette: Fixed restrained premium palette of ink black, warm ivory, muted sage, and a single antique-gold accent, with quiet contrast against a white or ivory field. Typography: VELORA appears as the main wordmark; botanical fragrance atelier appears as a smaller editorial subtitle with clean premium spacing. Signature Elements: Fable-like symbolic animal, flowing body lines, refined posture, tiny emblematic details, editorial wordmark, and minimalist ivory presentation. Restrictions: Keep the mark original, brand-ready, clean, premium, readable, flat, mascot-free, clutter-free, and watermark-free.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
